examples: They came backstage afterward, cooing and toadying to him.
After the show, we were allowed to go backstage to meet the cast.
The performers, in costume and makeup, were walking up and down backstage.
Oasis split up three years ago after an argument backstage at a concert in Paris.
In 2004, I sat backstage with Ben Roethlisberger and his family as draft countdown began.
